data.requirement: Calculate tenure-based metrics like average tenure for churned customers and age cohort analysis using binned age groups (20-30, 30-40 etc)
data.reason: Birth year derivation from age is redundant since age is already available. Age cohorts better align with existing 'senior_citizen' and 'under_30' demographic flags

visualization.requirement: Scatter plot showing cltv vs satisfaction_score with color encoding for customer_status (avoid matrix due to overplotting risk with 7043 points)
visualization.reason: Simplifies complex relationships while maintaining key correlation analysis capabilities

visualization.requirement: Symbol map with latitude/longitude points colored by churn_rate (aggregated per 0.5° grid) sized by total_population
visualization.reason: More feasible in Vega-Lite than hexbins while maintaining geographic analysis capabilities

visualization.requirement: Line chart showing churn rate by tenure bins (0-6mo, 7-12mo etc) with selectable reference lines for different age cohorts
visualization.reason: Better represents sequential tenure progression while maintaining cohort analysis capabilities

interaction.requirement: Range slider for filtering tenure bins in the line chart
interaction.reason: More appropriate than time slider for duration-based analysis of customer tenure
